title: 6 Pcs Artificial Chrysanthemum Ball Flowers, Diwali Decorations for House, Decorative Faux Ball Flowers for Indoor Floral Arrangement Home Decoration (Orange)
features: Set: 6 artificial flowers (vase not included). Quantity sufficient for you and your family. Artificial spherical chrysanthemums measure 11.02 inches (28 cm) in length with a flower head diameter of 2.75 inches (7 cm). Long-distance shipping may cause slight deformation, which can be restored using a hairdryer.

Premium Materials: Artificial chrysanthemums crafted from silk fabric. Stems feature plastic-coated steel wire for enhanced structural stability. Petals exhibit exceptional realism, combining lifelike texture, exquisite craftsmanship, and sturdy construction—all crafted from non-toxic, eco-friendly materials.
Versatile Usage: Flexible metal wire within stems allows trimming to fit any vase. Freely bendable stems facilitate styling; mix and match colors and lengths to create personalized bouquets.

Versatile Applications: Suitable for any occasion, enhancing festive atmospheres or serving as everyday decor. Ideal for DIY bouquets, wedding arrangements, home decor, cake embellishments, and space accents. Combine with other artificial flowers and foliage to create personalized decorative styles.

Easy Maintenance: Unlike fresh-cut flowers, petals and leaves resist shedding. Simple to clean and long-lasting. If dust accumulates, gently wipe with a dry cloth or rinse with water, then dry with a clean cloth. Gentle handling extends longevity.
